caption: In a surgical setting, a person wearing blue gloves and a yellow glove performs a medical procedure on a patient's abdomen. The surgeon uses a metal surgical tool to manipulate a small piece of tissue within an incision. A white gauze pad with blood stains is positioned near the incision site. Across the frames, the surgeon's hands move as they adjust the tissue and tools, with the yellow-gloved hand moving in and out of the frame to assist. Two consistent overlays appear in each frame: a pink female silhouette icon next to the text "Day 5" on the left, and a small icon of a surgical tool next to the text "Sim Week" on the right. The lighting is focused intensely on the surgical area, while the surrounding background remains dark.
